# iru_user (Data Source)

Get details for a specific user.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the User.

### Read-Only

- `email` (String)
- `is_archived` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
